rulings.Case Title: ERNESTO MEDINA VS. ROBERT G. DOERING
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Order For Sale Of A Dwelling
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 19, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO MEDINA Application For Order For Sale Of A Dwelling GRANTED, Plaintiff to prepare and present OSC order in accordance with CCP 704.750. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition Of Plaintiff For The Preservation Of Subletting Business Records Of Davani Marble Inc. Et Al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday December 19, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF KIM KONAMI Verified Petition Of Plaintiff For The Preservation Of Subletting Business Records Of Davani Marble Inc. Et Al DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that CCP 2035.030 may be employed in an existing action as to Defendants who are named and/or have appeared in the action. =(501/REQ)
